deploy.startCommand: php bin/console cache:clear --env=prod --no-warmup && php bin/console doctrine:database:create --if-not-exists && php bin/console doctrine:migrations:migrate --no-interaction || true && php bin/console app:create-admin ${ADMIN_EMAIL:-admin@vapeshop.ph} ${ADMIN_PASSWORD:-newadminpass123} && php -S 0.0.0.0:$PORT -t public
